cards.name: 7 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: harvest, rewards, results, growth, progress, perseverance, patience, planning

cards.name: 9 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: stubbornness, rigidity, defensiveness, refusing compromise, giving up

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: practical, reliable, efficient, stoic, slow and steady, hard-working, committed, patient, conservative
